news.title:
NBCC signed MoUs with HUDCO for August Kranti Bhawan redevelopment and funding of self-sustainable projects.
HUDCO will fund NBCC projects, while NBCC provides project management, monetization, and consultancy services.
news.summary:
NBCC signed MoUs with HUDCO for August Kranti Bhawan redevelopment and funding of self-sustainable projects.
HUDCO will fund NBCC projects, while NBCC provides project management, monetization, and consultancy services.

news.title:
NBCC stated HUDCO signed MoUs for land redevelopment and asset monetisation.
These MoUs may bolster project pipelines and monetisation opportunities for NBCC.
news.summary:
NBCC stated HUDCO signed MoUs for land redevelopment and asset monetisation.
These MoUs may bolster project pipelines and monetisation opportunities for NBCC.

news.title:
NTPC announces full operation of 1,000 MW Tehri PSP, boosting renewable power. HUDCO and NBCC sign MoUs for urban renewal and real estate development.
L&T Realty acquires IGSL for ₹1,123 cr; AstraZeneca plans to sell Bengaluru plant for ₹3,400 cr. Zaggle partners Generali, and Shalby expands kidney transplant services.
news.summary:
NTPC announces full operation of 1,000 MW Tehri PSP, boosting renewable power. HUDCO and NBCC sign MoUs for urban renewal and real estate development.
L&T Realty acquires IGSL for ₹1,123 cr; AstraZeneca plans to sell Bengaluru plant for ₹3,400 cr. Zaggle partners Generali, and Shalby expands kidney transplant services.

news.title:
NBCC aims for Rs 18,000 crore revenue by FY27, focusing on real estate.
Key projects include redevelopment and real estate in South Delhi and nationwide.
news.summary:
NBCC aims for Rs 18,000 crore revenue by FY27, focusing on real estate.
Key projects include redevelopment and real estate in South Delhi and nationwide.

news.title:
NBCC (India) Ltd engaged as Project Management Consultant in Seychelles for housing and infra works.
The USD 75M project for 1,008 units and STP will be funded by EXIM Bank's LoC scheme.
news.summary:
NBCC (India) Ltd engaged as Project Management Consultant in Seychelles for housing and infra works.
The USD 75M project for 1,008 units and STP will be funded by EXIM Bank's LoC scheme.

news.title:
HDFC Bank, NBCC, Indigo, Balkrishna Industries, and GR Infraprojects are key stocks to watch.
GR Infraprojects secures ₹2,440.9 crore NHAI order; Balkrishna Industries to issue ₹750 crore NCDs.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank, NBCC, Indigo, Balkrishna Industries, and GR Infraprojects are key stocks to watch.
GR Infraprojects secures ₹2,440.9 crore NHAI order; Balkrishna Industries to issue ₹750 crore NCDs.

news.title: NBCC wins ₹58.61 crore contract to develop facilities at an Odisha university.
news.summary: NBCC wins ₹58.61 crore contract to develop facilities at an Odisha university.

news.title: NBCC secures orders worth Rs 320 cr and Rs 5,800 cr for Rajasthan projects.
news.summary: NBCC secures orders worth Rs 320 cr and Rs 5,800 cr for Rajasthan projects.

news.title:
NBCC (India) Ltd received work orders worth approx. ₹319.78Cr in regular business.
Projects include ₹228Cr housing for Oil India, ₹84Cr bridges in Meghalaya, ₹8Cr in Patna.
news.summary:
NBCC (India) Ltd received work orders worth approx. ₹319.78Cr in regular business.
Projects include ₹228Cr housing for Oil India, ₹84Cr bridges in Meghalaya, ₹8Cr in Patna.

news.title:
NBCC gets Rajasthan Govt nod for ₹5,800 crore Mandapam Convention Centre.
Project includes facilities, sustainable infrastructure development.
news.summary:
NBCC gets Rajasthan Govt nod for ₹5,800 crore Mandapam Convention Centre.
Project includes facilities, sustainable infrastructure development.

news.title:
NBCC, NCC, G R Infraprojects, and Va Tech Wabag feature order books surpassing market caps, signaling strong demand.
Key metrics: RoE >12%, RoCE >12%, low debt-to-equity ratios; focus on operational efficiency and sector expansion.
news.summary:
NBCC, NCC, G R Infraprojects, and Va Tech Wabag feature order books surpassing market caps, signaling strong demand.
Key metrics: RoE >12%, RoCE >12%, low debt-to-equity ratios; focus on operational efficiency and sector expansion.

news.title:
NBCC plans to approach SC for RERA exemption to complete 16 stalled Supertech projects.
11 of these projects require fresh funding; NBCC seeks relief to proceed swiftly.
news.summary:
NBCC plans to approach SC for RERA exemption to complete 16 stalled Supertech projects.
11 of these projects require fresh funding; NBCC seeks relief to proceed swiftly.

news.title: NBCC secures a work order worth Rs. 775.3 crore, boosting its project pipeline.
news.summary: NBCC secures a work order worth Rs. 775.3 crore, boosting its project pipeline.

news.title:
NBCC awarded redevelopment contracts worth Rs. 775.3 Cr for DDA staff quarters.
Projects include Old Rajinder Nagar, Safdarjung Development Area with a self-sustainable model.
news.summary:
NBCC awarded redevelopment contracts worth Rs. 775.3 Cr for DDA staff quarters.
Projects include Old Rajinder Nagar, Safdarjung Development Area with a self-sustainable model.

news.title:
BPCL faces a ₹1,816.65 crore excise demand; plans to appeal to CESTAT. Chalet Hotels to invest ₹632.8 crore for a luxury hotel in Hyderabad by FY2029.
Lupin gets EU approval for its biosimilar Ranluspec. Concor, HFCL, NBCC, and Waaree Energies announce key projects across logistics, telecom, construction, and solar sectors.
news.summary:
BPCL faces a ₹1,816.65 crore excise demand; plans to appeal to CESTAT. Chalet Hotels to invest ₹632.8 crore for a luxury hotel in Hyderabad by FY2029.
Lupin gets EU approval for its biosimilar Ranluspec. Concor, HFCL, NBCC, and Waaree Energies announce key projects across logistics, telecom, construction, and solar sectors.

news.title:
NBCC (India) Limited secures ₹76.3 crore work orders from Dharanidhar University.
The project includes academic, hostel structures, infrastructure, and external developments.
news.summary:
NBCC (India) Limited secures ₹76.3 crore work orders from Dharanidhar University.
The project includes academic, hostel structures, infrastructure, and external developments.

news.title:
NBCC (India) Ltd reported INR 3,022 cr consolidated income in Q3, 8% YoY growth.
Standalone PAT surged 53% YoY to INR 196 cr; order book at INR 1,27,000 cr.
news.summary:
NBCC (India) Ltd reported INR 3,022 cr consolidated income in Q3, 8% YoY growth.
Standalone PAT surged 53% YoY to INR 196 cr; order book at INR 1,27,000 cr.

news.title:
NSE imposes an additional 15% margin on 18 stocks in March series to curb concentration risk.
Stocks include Vodafone Idea, RBL Bank, NBCC, Aditya Birla Capital, DLF, and others. ASM framework stocks also impacted.
news.summary:
NSE imposes an additional 15% margin on 18 stocks in March series to curb concentration risk.
Stocks include Vodafone Idea, RBL Bank, NBCC, Aditya Birla Capital, DLF, and others. ASM framework stocks also impacted.

news.title:
NBCC (India) Ltd declared a 3rd interim dividend of Rs. 0.12 per share for FY 2025-26.
Record date for dividend eligibility is Feb 25, 2026; payment as per Companies Act, 2013.
news.summary:
NBCC (India) Ltd declared a 3rd interim dividend of Rs. 0.12 per share for FY 2025-26.
Record date for dividend eligibility is Feb 25, 2026; payment as per Companies Act, 2013.

news.title:
NBCC (India) Ltd received work orders worth Rs. 104.95Cr in ordinary business.
Orders include Rs. 14.72Cr project for SAIL Rourkela and Rs. 90.23Cr for NLC India.
news.summary:
NBCC (India) Ltd received work orders worth Rs. 104.95Cr in ordinary business.
Orders include Rs. 14.72Cr project for SAIL Rourkela and Rs. 90.23Cr for NLC India.
